title: pilosella dissoluta
intro: Pilosella dissoluta, also known as the Rough Hawk's Beard or Pilosella, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of taraxasterol, a saponin that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella dissoluta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions.
